data.title: The crypto market suffered a heavy blow, ETH fell more than 10%, and BTC fell below $104,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to SoSoValue data, affected by the escalation of the situation in the Middle East, Israel's attack on Iran and other factors, the crypto market sector fell across the board, with a general decline of about 3% to 13%. Among them, Ethereum (ETH) fell by 10.07% in 24 hours, falling below $2,500, and Bitcoin (BTC) fell by 4.42%, falling below $104,000.
In other sectors, the CeFi sector fell 3.63% in 24 hours, but LEO Token (LEO) was relatively strong, up 1.30%; the PayFi sector fell 6.77%, Keeta (KTA), which had a large increase in the previous period, fell 22.55%, the Layer1 sector fell 7.88%, Cardano (ADA), Solana (SOL), Sui (SUI) fell 10.93%, 11.40%, 12.64% respectively; the GameFi sector fell 10.64%, but boosted by rumors that Tencent plans to acquire Nexon, the developer of "MapleStory" for US$15 billion, NEXPACE (NXPC) rose 8.20% against the trend; the Meme sector fell 11.71%, Pepe (PEPE) and Fartcoin (FARTCOIN) fell 14.55% and 18.62% respectively, the DeFi sector fell 11.73%, and the Layer2 sector fell 13.02%.
At the same time, the crypto sector index, which reflects the historical market trends of the sector, shows that the ssiDeFi, ssiAI, and ssiLayer2 indexes fell by 13.47%, 13.40%, and 13.34% respectively in 24 hours.

data.title: Israeli military: Iran's nuclear program has accelerated significantly in recent years, and the Iranian regime is approaching a point of no return
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - The Israeli military said that in recent months, the accumulated intelligence information has provided evidence that the Iranian regime is approaching a point of no return. In recent years, Iran's nuclear program has accelerated significantly, allowing Tehran to take an important step towards obtaining nuclear weapons. (Jinshi)

data.title: SEC Officially Repeals Gary Gensler-Era Proposal for DeFi and Custody
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News The U.S. Securities and Exchange Commission formally withdrew several proposed rules on Thursday that would have imposed stricter regulation on DeFi and cryptocurrency custody.
The proposals were made under the leadership of former Chairman Gary Gensler, who led the agency's "enforcement supervision" approach. The repealed proposals include proposed revisions to Rule 3b-16 of the Exchange Act, which was issued in April 2023. The proposal seeks to expand the definition of an exchange, specifically to include decentralized financial platforms under the regulation of national securities exchanges. The proposal has drawn criticism from all sides of the industry. (The Block)

data.title: OKX will launch LAUSDT and HOMEUSDT perpetual contracts
data.description: According to the official announcement, OKX will launch LAUSDT and HOMEUSDT perpetual contracts from 6:00 to 6:15 pm (UTC+8) on June 13, 2025. The LAUSDT contract trading will open at 6:00 pm (UTC+8) on June 13, 2025, and the HOMEUSDT contract trading will open at 6:15 pm (UTC+8) on June 13. (This newsletter is generated by AI)

data.title: Source: Trump tried to get Iran nuclear deal out of the way before Israel
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: A person familiar with the matter said that Trump and his senior foreign policy advisers discussed at Camp David last Sunday and Monday how to reach an Iran nuclear agreement without escalating the situation. The Iran issue was one of several foreign policy topics and meetings held during the evacuation of American personnel. Government officials seemed determined to reach an agreement through diplomatic means before the Israeli air strikes. Just after 5 pm US time on Thursday, Trump said on Truth Social: "We are still committed to resolving the Iranian nuclear issue through diplomatic means! My entire government has been instructed to negotiate with Iran. They can be a great country, but they must first completely give up the hope of obtaining nuclear weapons. Thank you for your attention to this matter!" As of Thursday morning, US Middle East envoy Witkoff is still expected to travel to Oman for the sixth round of negotiations with Iran, although US officials have doubts about whether the negotiations can continue after the Israeli attack. (Jin Shi)

data.title: Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei: Israel will be severely punished
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily reported that Iran's Supreme Leader Khamenei issued a statement after the Israeli attack saying that Israel will be severely punished.

data.title: Whales/institutions that made profits from two ETH waves bought $127 million worth of ETH in the past 6 hours
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the monitoring of on-chain analyst Ember, the whale/institution that made a profit of $30.45 million in two ETH waves has used 127 million USDC to buy 48,800 ETH in the last 6 hours after today's decline.
After they made a profit of $30.45 million through two ETH waves some time ago, they started the third ETH purchase on the 11th, and spent 46.494 million USDC to buy 16,500 ETH.
ETH fell sharply this morning, and they continued to buy ETH. So far, they have transferred a total of 127 million USDC to Wintermute and Coinbase, and purchased 48,825 ETH withdrawal addresses. In other words, their third ETH wave has currently spent a total of $174.1 million to buy 65,325 ETH, with an average price of $2,665. Currently in a floating loss state.

data.title: Iran: Israel and the United States will pay a heavy price
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News - Iranian official media conveyed a statement from the General Staff of the Iranian Armed Forces, saying that Israel and the United States will "pay a very heavy price". In response, the United States and Israel will be "severely hit". It is reported that the Iranian Armed Forces will soon launch a large-scale counterattack, and the Armed Forces said: "Retaliatory attacks are certain." (Jinshi)

data.title: Israeli official: Washington informed before attacking Iran
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: Israeli officials told Israeli public broadcaster KAN that Israel has fully coordinated with Washington on the Iran issue and that Israel had informed Washington before launching an attack on Iran. (Jinshi)

data.title: MicroStrategy Board Member Sells All MSTR Shares for Over $10 Million
data.description: According to Odaily, MicroStrategy board member Carl Rickertsen has sold all his MSTR shares through multiple transactions this month, cashing out slightly over $10 million. Rickertsen, who joined the board in 2019, has frequently sold shares on the same day he exercised stock options. Following this recent series of transactions, he reported on June 5 that he no longer holds any shares.

data.title: Strategy director Carl Rickertsen sold out his MSTR stock this month, cashing in more than $10 million
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: MicroStrategy board member Carl Rickertsen sold all of his MSTR shares through multiple transactions this month, cashing in just over $10 million. Rickertsen has sold his stock options on the day of exercising them many times since joining the board in 2019. After this round of transactions was completed, he reported on June 5 that he no longer held any shares. (Protos)

data.title: 12 hours after the start of the Gate "Red Bull Racing Tour", the contract trading volume has exceeded 600 million US dollars, and the number of participants has exceeded 20,000
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News Gate officially opened the "Red Bull Racing Tour" on June 12. Within 12 hours of the start of the race, the number of participants exceeded 20,000, and the total contract transaction volume exceeded 600 million US dollars. The total prize pool of this event is as high as 5,000 GT, and participants have the opportunity to win tickets to the F1 Grand Prix worth tens of thousands of dollars.
It is reported that the event has three major competition lists, including the champion driver trading list, which can win up to 3,500 GT, F1 tickets and exclusive limited peripherals; the champion driver income list, which can win up to 1,000 GT; and the bounty driver list, where users can share 500 GT rewards after completing tasks. This event fully covers the user path from professional trading to light participation. New users can register to receive a 10 USDT experience voucher, which is limited to 500 copies per day, on a first-come, first-served basis.

data.title: A certain whale address bought 77,353 HYPEs, bringing the total holdings to 799,698
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Onchain Lens monitoring, a whale address deposited 8.7 million USDC to HyperLiquid and purchased 77,353.84 HYPE at $38.68, with a total value of $3 million.
This whale user also holds 799,698 HYPE worth $30.77 million, and is likely to continue to buy more HYPE.

data.title: U.S. President Trump to Attend National Security Council Meeting
data.description: According to Odaily, the White House has announced that U.S. President Donald Trump will participate in a National Security Council meeting at 11 a.m. Eastern Time (23:00 UTC+8).
